heroHeadline: Bad Bunny Wins Pollstar Latin Tour of the Year as European Leg of DTMF World Tour Approaches
heroSubtitle: Tracking the rise from SoundCloud uploads in Vega Baja to 100 billion Spotify streams, a historic Super Bowl LX halftime performance, and Grammy Album of the Year. Bad Bunny won the Pollstar Latin Tour of the Year (Apr 15) for the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour; PriceLabs data shows Warsaw rental bookings up 431% ahead of his July concert there; and Pedro Pascal revealed (Apr 17) he sent a selfie email volunteering his way into the Super Bowl LX halftime show. European leg begins May 22, 2026 in Barcelona.
footerNote: Data sourced from Rimas Entertainment, Billboard, Spotify Newsroom, RIAA, Latin Recording Academy, Recording Academy, Pollstar, and major media
